title: rubus delicatus
intro: Rubus delicatus, also known as the fragrant raspberry or delicate dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rubus delicatus include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Rubus delicatus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
